fix_suggestions.label: Sprite renderer
fix_suggestions.reason: Sprite, transform, or path-data mismatches usually come from the SVG sprite renderer rather than parser logic.

fix_suggestions.label: Graphviz coordinate chain
fix_suggestions.reason: Graphviz-backed coordinate drift usually belongs to post-dot coordinate extraction or edge/node handoff.
